description: A list of live chat moderator resources for a given live chat.
name: LiveChatModeratorListResponse

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveChatModeratorListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

prevPageToken.description: The token for the previous page of results.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list of live streaming resources.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of moderators that match the request criteria.
A liveChatModerator resource identifies a user who has moderator privileges in a YouTube live chat.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveChatModerator.

id.description: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the moderator.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the moderator.

liveChatId.description: The liveChatId is the live chat id for this moderator resource.

channelId.description: The YouTube channel ID of the moderator.

channelUrl.description: The channel URL of the moderator.
